payload.title: Diversity Committee Meeting
payload.description: MTA Diversity Committee Meeting book for April 29, 2024, including meeting minutes, executive summary, DBE certification, Small Business Development Program, contract compliance, discretionary awards, financial services, asset fund management, and workforce/EEO reports.

tool_args.label: MTA Small Business Development Program (SBDP)
tool_args.raw_text: Small Business Development Program (SBDP) - To develop and grow emerging contractors through classes, on-the-job training and technical assistance on prime contracts with MTA Agencies

payload.description: To develop and grow emerging contractors through classes, on-the-job training and technical assistance on prime contracts with MTA Agencies, thereby creating a larger pool of diverse qualified contractors who can compete for, and complete MTA construction projects safely, timely and within budget.

tool_args.label: MTA Five Year Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Strategic Plan
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Five Year Diversity Equity and Inclusion Strategic Plan 2023 - 2028

payload.project_name: MTA Five Year Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Strategic Plan
payload.description: MTA's first-ever Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion Strategic Plan covering 2023-2028, developed to comply with New York State Executive Order 187. Goals include: Deliver Equitable Programs and Services, Recruit Retain and Develop a Talented Workforce, Foster an Inclusive Workplace Culture, and Provide a Platform for Collaborative and Adaptive Communication and Engagement.

tool_args.label: MWBE/SDVOB payments 1st and 2nd quarters NYS FY23-24
tool_args.raw_text: MTA made a total of $378 million in payments to MWBE/SDVOB firms in the 1st and 2nd quarters of NYS FY23-24 and met the SDVOB 6% goal and surpassed the MWBE goal by 2%.

payload.raw_value_text: $378 million in payments to MWBE/SDVOB firms in the 1st and 2nd quarters of NYS FY23-24

tool_args.label: Diversity Committee Meeting April 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Diversity Committee Meeting / Monday, 4/29/2024 / 12:00 - 12:45 PM ET

payload.description: MTA Diversity Committee Meeting held on April 29, 2024, 12:00-12:45 PM ET. Agenda included Public Comment, Approval of Minutes, 2024 Work Plan, Executive Summary, Business and Diversity Initiatives, DBE Certification Activity Report, SBDP Update, MWDBE and SDVOB Contract Compliance, Discretionary Awards, Financial Services, Asset Fund Management, and EEO Activity/Workforce Report.

tool_args.label: Diversity Committee Meeting December 2023
tool_args.raw_text: 2 Broadway, 20th Floor / New York, NY 10004 / Monday, December 18, 2023

payload.description: December 2023 Diversity Committee meeting at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor, New York, NY 10004. Chair Blanca Lopez called to order. No quorum present; minutes not approved.

tool_args.label: SBDP 10% increase goal exceeded with 17%
tool_args.raw_text: The goal of a 10% increase in contractor recruitment was eclipsed by SBDP delivering a 17% overall increase in recruitment. Recruitment brought in 70 new firms as compared to 60 new firms in the last year.

payload.claim_text: The goal of a 10% increase in contractor recruitment was eclipsed by SBDP delivering a 17% overall increase in recruitment. Recruitment brought in 70 new firms as compared to 60 new firms in the last year.

tool_args.label: SBDP Loan Program 233% increase with BOC Capital
tool_args.raw_text: The new loan program contract with BOC Capital Corp, a lender focused on funding small businesses, has doubled the number of loans as compared to last year from the prior lending bank. MTA and BOC has approved ten of ten loan applicants in 2023, where only three loans were approved in the last year, a 233% increase overall.

payload.claim_text: The new loan program contract with BOC Capital Corp, a lender focused on funding small businesses, has doubled the number of loans as compared to last year from the prior lending bank. MTA and BOC has approved ten of ten loan applicants in 2023, where only three loans were approved in the last year, a 233% increase overall.

tool_args.label: FFY 2023 DBE goal 20% achieved 16%
tool_args.raw_text: For FFY 2023, MTA awarded $2.3 billion in the federally funded portion of contracts, with approximately $392.3 million (16%) being awarded to certified DBEs. On contracts closed during the first half of the FFY 2023, MTA achieved 22% DBE participation.

payload.claim_text: During FFY 2023, MTA awarded $2.3 billion in the federally funded portion of contracts, with approximately $392.3 million (16%) being awarded to certified DBEs. On contracts closed during the first half of the FFY 2023, MTA achieved 22% DBE participation.

tool_args.label: People with Disabilities self-identification caveat
tool_args.raw_text: We believe that there are more people with disabilities in our workforce, but they have not self-identified as such.

payload.gap_text: We believe that there are more people with disabilities in our workforce, but they have not self-identified as such.
payload.missing_information: Actual count of employees with disabilities
payload.description: The source notes that the reported figure for employees with disabilities (1%) likely undercounts because many employees have not self-identified.
